name: onesearch
description: Main Onesearch CLI router skill for Codex workflows.

interface.longDescription: A standalone local plugin for Onesearch CLI workflows. It intentionally bundles only the main Onesearch router skill; route-specific workflow and provider guidance is loaded from the installed CLI with `onesearch skills list` and `onesearch skills show <route-id> --format content`.
defaultPrompt: Use $onesearch for web search, current/latest public information, hot/trending lists, source-backed facts, URL reading, docs lookup, site map/crawl, repo wiki context, and provider-specific Onesearch CLI workflows.
For route-specific guidance, run `onesearch skills list --format json` and `onesearch skills show <route-id> --format content`.
